calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Parisa Weiss, via Zoom, for B. George Seikaly, via Zoom, Petitioner.

Counsel reports regarding gifts listed in the holographic will and what prompted the Petitioner to make distributions without prior court order, including, but not limited to, making mortgage payments to avoid losing the real property to foreclosure. Counsel offers additional testimony regarding the urgent nature of this matter and how the distributions had been made without court approval as she believed that the court's calendars had been impacted by the pandemic. The court reminds counsel that regardless of how impacted the court's calendars may have been, probate code must be followed.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
